    94                                                 I.E if array is [1, 2, 3] and you give it 1.5, the points around 1.5 are [1, 2], so it will return the indices of [1,2], which are [0, 1].
    95                                                 However, since we need to use this indices to slice into the 8D matrix, we return a slice object that will slice indices.
    96                                         
    97                                                 if the array contains the target exactly, it'll just return a slice for getting specifically that point.
    98                                         
    99                                                 If we pass in "all" as the target, it will return a slice that will slice the entirety of that array
   100                                                 """
   101                                         
   102    332.5 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           if target == "all":
   103                                                     return slice(None)  # slice all of the points
   104                                                 # NOTE: PROBLEM CLAUSE FOR NOT ALLOWING GEOGRAD TO BE MORE THAN 0.7
   105    332.5 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           if target < array[0] or target > array[-1]:
   106                                                     raise Exception(
   107                                                         f"expected given value {target} to be between min and max of given array ({array[0], array[-1]})"
   108                                                     )
   109    332.5 MiB      0.0 MiB          10           for i, value in enumerate(array):
   110    332.5 MiB      0.0 MiB          10               if value == target:
   111    332.5 MiB      0.0 MiB           1                   return slice(i, i + 1)
   112    332.5 MiB      0.0 MiB           9               if value > target:
   113                                                         return slice(i - 1, i + 1)

   115    332.5 MiB    332.5 MiB           1       @profile(stream=memory_profile_file)
   116                                             def read_values_around_point_for_interpolation(
   117                                                 self, zarr_array, point, parameter_values
   118                                             ):
   119                                                 """
   120                                                 reads the values around the given point(s) for interpolation from the passed in zarr_array.
   121                                                 If "all" is passed in as any of the coordinates of the point,
   122                                                 then it'll slice across the entirety of that coordinate's dimension
   123                                                 """
   124    332.5 MiB      0.0 MiB           9           indices = [
   125    332.5 MiB      0.0 MiB           8               self.get_parameter_indices(params, value)
   126    332.5 MiB      0.0 MiB           9               for value, params in zip(point, parameter_values)
   127                                                 ]
   128    332.5 MiB      0.0 MiB           2           data = zarr_array[
   129    332.5 MiB      0.0 MiB           1               tuple(indices)
   130                                                 ]  # need to convert into into a tuple or zarr thinks we're doing fancy indexing
   131    332.5 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           return indices, data

   133    332.5 MiB    332.5 MiB           1       @profile(stream=memory_profile_file)
   134                                             def interpolate_points(self, zarr_array, point_to_read_around, points):
   135                                                 """
   136                                                 Reads in only the data directly around points_to_read_around from zarr_array and interpolates the passed in points on that data.
   137                                                 Essentially a wrapper around interpn where we only read the data we need.
   138                                                 Alot of the data from the original zarr_array is not needed for interpolation since the default linear interpolation method of interpn only needs the corners of the hypercube around a given point to interpolate it's value
   139                                                 Instead of the entire 8D parameter space.
   140                                                 """
   141    332.5 MiB      0.0 MiB           2           indices, values_around_point = self.read_values_around_point_for_interpolation(
   142    332.5 MiB      0.0 MiB           1               zarr_array, point_to_read_around, self.ivars
   143                                                 )
   144    332.5 MiB      0.0 MiB           9           grid = [
   145    332.5 MiB      0.0 MiB           9               params[these_indices] for these_indices, params in zip(indices, self.ivars)
   146                                                 ]  # the grid is the values of the parameters at the points we're interpolating between
   147    332.5 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           interpolated_points = interpn(grid, values_around_point, points)
   148    332.5 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           return interpolated_points

   376    332.5 MiB    332.5 MiB           1       @profile(stream=memory_profile_file)
   377                                             def interp_kW(
   378                                                 self,
   379                                                 point,
   380                                                 Tout,
   381                                                 Pout,
   382                                                 Tamb=300.0, # AB: is this surface temperature? What is Tamb?
   383                                             ):
   384                                         
   385    332.5 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           mdot = point[0]
   386    332.5 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           Tinj = point[5]
   387                                         
   388    332.9 MiB      0.4 MiB           1           enthalpy_out = CP.PropsSI("H", "T", Tout, "P", Pout, self.CP_fluid)
   389    332.9 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           enthalpy_in = CP.PropsSI("H", "T", Tinj, "P", self.Pinj, self.CP_fluid)
   390    332.9 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           entropy_out = CP.PropsSI("S", "T", Tout, "P", Pout, self.CP_fluid)
   391    332.9 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           entropy_in = CP.PropsSI("S", "T", Tinj, "P", self.Pinj, self.CP_fluid)
   392                                         
   393    332.9 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           kWe = (
   394    332.9 MiB      0.0 MiB           3               mdot
   395    332.9 MiB      0.0 MiB           1               * (enthalpy_out - enthalpy_in - Tamb * (entropy_out - entropy_in))
   396    332.9 MiB      0.0 MiB           1               / 1000.0
   397                                                 )
   398    332.9 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           kWt = mdot * (enthalpy_out - enthalpy_in) / 1000.0
   399                                         
   400    332.9 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           return kWe, kWt

Line #    Mem usage    Increment  Occurrences   Line Contents
=============================================================
    90    332.9 MiB    332.9 MiB           1       @profile(stream=memory_profile_file)
    91                                             def get_parameter_indices(self, array, target):
    92                                                 """
    93                                                 returns the slice that would give you the points in the given array around target. Assumes that array is sorted.
    94                                                 I.E if array is [1, 2, 3] and you give it 1.5, the points around 1.5 are [1, 2], so it will return the indices of [1,2], which are [0, 1].
    95                                                 However, since we need to use this indices to slice into the 8D matrix, we return a slice object that will slice indices.
    96                                         
    97                                                 if the array contains the target exactly, it'll just return a slice for getting specifically that point.
    98                                         
    99                                                 If we pass in "all" as the target, it will return a slice that will slice the entirety of that array
   100                                                 """
   101                                         
   102    332.9 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           if target == "all":
   103                                                     return slice(None)  # slice all of the points
   104                                                 # NOTE: PROBLEM CLAUSE FOR NOT ALLOWING GEOGRAD TO BE MORE THAN 0.7
   105    332.9 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           if target < array[0] or target > array[-1]:
   106                                                     raise Exception(
   107                                                         f"expected given value {target} to be between min and max of given array ({array[0], array[-1]})"
   108                                                     )
   109    332.9 MiB      0.0 MiB          10           for i, value in enumerate(array):
   110    332.9 MiB      0.0 MiB          10               if value == target:
   111    332.9 MiB      0.0 MiB           1                   return slice(i, i + 1)
   112    332.9 MiB      0.0 MiB           9               if value > target:
   113                                                         return slice(i - 1, i + 1)

   115    332.9 MiB    332.9 MiB           1       @profile(stream=memory_profile_file)
   116                                             def read_values_around_point_for_interpolation(
   117                                                 self, zarr_array, point, parameter_values
   118                                             ):
   119                                                 """
   120                                                 reads the values around the given point(s) for interpolation from the passed in zarr_array.
   121                                                 If "all" is passed in as any of the coordinates of the point,
   122                                                 then it'll slice across the entirety of that coordinate's dimension
   123                                                 """
   124    332.9 MiB      0.0 MiB           9           indices = [
   125    332.9 MiB      0.0 MiB           8               self.get_parameter_indices(params, value)
   126    332.9 MiB      0.0 MiB           9               for value, params in zip(point, parameter_values)
   127                                                 ]
   128    332.9 MiB      0.0 MiB           2           data = zarr_array[
   129    332.9 MiB      0.0 MiB           1               tuple(indices)
   130                                                 ]  # need to convert into into a tuple or zarr thinks we're doing fancy indexing
   131    332.9 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           return indices, data

   133    332.9 MiB    332.9 MiB           1       @profile(stream=memory_profile_file)
   134                                             def interpolate_points(self, zarr_array, point_to_read_around, points):
   135                                                 """
   136                                                 Reads in only the data directly around points_to_read_around from zarr_array and interpolates the passed in points on that data.
   137                                                 Essentially a wrapper around interpn where we only read the data we need.
   138                                                 Alot of the data from the original zarr_array is not needed for interpolation since the default linear interpolation method of interpn only needs the corners of the hypercube around a given point to interpolate it's value
   139                                                 Instead of the entire 8D parameter space.
   140                                                 """
   141    332.9 MiB      0.0 MiB           2           indices, values_around_point = self.read_values_around_point_for_interpolation(
   142    332.9 MiB      0.0 MiB           1               zarr_array, point_to_read_around, self.ivars
   143                                                 )
   144    332.9 MiB      0.0 MiB           9           grid = [
   145    332.9 MiB      0.0 MiB           9               params[these_indices] for these_indices, params in zip(indices, self.ivars)
   146                                                 ]  # the grid is the values of the parameters at the points we're interpolating between
   147    332.9 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           interpolated_points = interpn(grid, values_around_point, points)
   148    332.9 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           return interpolated_points

    94                                                 I.E if array is [1, 2, 3] and you give it 1.5, the points around 1.5 are [1, 2], so it will return the indices of [1,2], which are [0, 1].
    95                                                 However, since we need to use this indices to slice into the 8D matrix, we return a slice object that will slice indices.
    96                                         
    97                                                 if the array contains the target exactly, it'll just return a slice for getting specifically that point.
    98                                         
    99                                                 If we pass in "all" as the target, it will return a slice that will slice the entirety of that array
   100                                                 """
   101                                         
   102    333.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           if target == "all":
   103                                                     return slice(None)  # slice all of the points
   104                                                 # NOTE: PROBLEM CLAUSE FOR NOT ALLOWING GEOGRAD TO BE MORE THAN 0.7
   105    333.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           if target < array[0] or target > array[-1]:
   106                                                     raise Exception(
   107                                                         f"expected given value {target} to be between min and max of given array ({array[0], array[-1]})"
   108                                                     )
   109    333.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           2           for i, value in enumerate(array):
   110    333.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           2               if value == target:
   111                                                         return slice(i, i + 1)
   112    333.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           2               if value > target:
   113    333.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1                   return slice(i - 1, i + 1)

    90    333.1 MiB    333.1 MiB           1       @profile(stream=memory_profile_file)
    91                                             def get_parameter_indices(self, array, target):
    92                                                 """
    93                                                 returns the slice that would give you the points in the given array around target. Assumes that array is sorted.
    94                                                 I.E if array is [1, 2, 3] and you give it 1.5, the points around 1.5 are [1, 2], so it will return the indices of [1,2], which are [0, 1].
    95                                                 However, since we need to use this indices to slice into the 8D matrix, we return a slice object that will slice indices.
    96                                         
    97                                                 if the array contains the target exactly, it'll just return a slice for getting specifically that point.
    98                                         
    99                                                 If we pass in "all" as the target, it will return a slice that will slice the entirety of that array
   100                                                 """
   101                                         
   102    333.1 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           if target == "all":
   103    333.1 MiB      0.0 MiB           1               return slice(None)  # slice all of the points
   104                                                 # NOTE: PROBLEM CLAUSE FOR NOT ALLOWING GEOGRAD TO BE MORE THAN 0.7
   105                                                 if target < array[0] or target > array[-1]:
   106                                                     raise Exception(
   107                                                         f"expected given value {target} to be between min and max of given array ({array[0], array[-1]})"
   108                                                     )
   109                                                 for i, value in enumerate(array):
   110                                                     if value == target:
   111                                                         return slice(i, i + 1)
   112                                                     if value > target:
   113                                                         return slice(i - 1, i + 1)

   115    333.0 MiB    333.0 MiB           1       @profile(stream=memory_profile_file)
   116                                             def read_values_around_point_for_interpolation(
   117                                                 self, zarr_array, point, parameter_values
   118                                             ):
   119                                                 """
   120                                                 reads the values around the given point(s) for interpolation from the passed in zarr_array.
   121                                                 If "all" is passed in as any of the coordinates of the point,
   122                                                 then it'll slice across the entirety of that coordinate's dimension
   123                                                 """
   124    333.1 MiB      0.0 MiB           9           indices = [
   125    333.1 MiB      0.1 MiB           8               self.get_parameter_indices(params, value)
   126    333.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           9               for value, params in zip(point, parameter_values)
   127                                                 ]
   128    333.3 MiB      0.2 MiB           2           data = zarr_array[
   129    333.1 MiB      0.0 MiB           1               tuple(indices)
   130                                                 ]  # need to convert into into a tuple or zarr thinks we're doing fancy indexing
   131    333.3 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           return indices, data

   133    333.0 MiB    333.0 MiB           1       @profile(stream=memory_profile_file)
   134                                             def interpolate_points(self, zarr_array, point_to_read_around, points):
   135                                                 """
   136                                                 Reads in only the data directly around points_to_read_around from zarr_array and interpolates the passed in points on that data.
   137                                                 Essentially a wrapper around interpn where we only read the data we need.
   138                                                 Alot of the data from the original zarr_array is not needed for interpolation since the default linear interpolation method of interpn only needs the corners of the hypercube around a given point to interpolate it's value
   139                                                 Instead of the entire 8D parameter space.
   140                                                 """
   141    333.3 MiB      0.3 MiB           2           indices, values_around_point = self.read_values_around_point_for_interpolation(
   142    333.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1               zarr_array, point_to_read_around, self.ivars
   143                                                 )
   144    333.3 MiB      0.0 MiB           9           grid = [
   145    333.3 MiB      0.0 MiB           9               params[these_indices] for these_indices, params in zip(indices, self.ivars)
   146                                                 ]  # the grid is the values of the parameters at the points we're interpolating between
   147    333.3 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           interpolated_points = interpn(grid, values_around_point, points)
   148    333.3 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           return interpolated_points

   376    333.3 MiB    333.3 MiB           1       @profile(stream=memory_profile_file)
   377                                             def interp_kW(
   378                                                 self,
   379                                                 point,
   380                                                 Tout,
   381                                                 Pout,
   382                                                 Tamb=300.0, # AB: is this surface temperature? What is Tamb?
   383                                             ):
   384                                         
   385    333.3 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           mdot = point[0]
   386    333.3 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           Tinj = point[5]
   387                                         
   388    333.3 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           enthalpy_out = CP.PropsSI("H", "T", Tout, "P", Pout, self.CP_fluid)
   389    333.3 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           enthalpy_in = CP.PropsSI("H", "T", Tinj, "P", self.Pinj, self.CP_fluid)
   390    333.3 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           entropy_out = CP.PropsSI("S", "T", Tout, "P", Pout, self.CP_fluid)
   391    333.3 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           entropy_in = CP.PropsSI("S", "T", Tinj, "P", self.Pinj, self.CP_fluid)
   392                                         
   393    333.3 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           kWe = (
   394    333.3 MiB      0.0 MiB           3               mdot
   395    333.3 MiB      0.0 MiB           1               * (enthalpy_out - enthalpy_in - Tamb * (entropy_out - entropy_in))
   396    333.3 MiB      0.0 MiB           1               / 1000.0
   397                                                 )
   398    333.3 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           kWt = mdot * (enthalpy_out - enthalpy_in) / 1000.0
   399                                         
   400    333.3 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           return kWe, kWt

    90    335.9 MiB    335.9 MiB           1       @profile(stream=memory_profile_file)
    91                                             def get_parameter_indices(self, array, target):
    92                                                 """
    93                                                 returns the slice that would give you the points in the given array around target. Assumes that array is sorted.
    94                                                 I.E if array is [1, 2, 3] and you give it 1.5, the points around 1.5 are [1, 2], so it will return the indices of [1,2], which are [0, 1].
    95                                                 However, since we need to use this indices to slice into the 8D matrix, we return a slice object that will slice indices.
    96                                         
    97                                                 if the array contains the target exactly, it'll just return a slice for getting specifically that point.
    98                                         
    99                                                 If we pass in "all" as the target, it will return a slice that will slice the entirety of that array
   100                                                 """
   101                                         
   102    335.9 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           if target == "all":
   103                                                     return slice(None)  # slice all of the points
   104                                                 # NOTE: PROBLEM CLAUSE FOR NOT ALLOWING GEOGRAD TO BE MORE THAN 0.7
   105    335.9 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           if target < array[0] or target > array[-1]:
   106                                                     raise Exception(
   107                                                         f"expected given value {target} to be between min and max of given array ({array[0], array[-1]})"
   108                                                     )
   109    335.9 MiB      0.0 MiB           3           for i, value in enumerate(array):
   110    335.9 MiB      0.0 MiB           3               if value == target:
   111                                                         return slice(i, i + 1)
   112    335.9 MiB      0.0 MiB           3               if value > target:
   113    335.9 MiB      0.0 MiB           1                   return slice(i - 1, i + 1)

   133    335.8 MiB    335.8 MiB           1       @profile(stream=memory_profile_file)
   134                                             def interpolate_points(self, zarr_array, point_to_read_around, points):
   135                                                 """
   136                                                 Reads in only the data directly around points_to_read_around from zarr_array and interpolates the passed in points on that data.
   137                                                 Essentially a wrapper around interpn where we only read the data we need.
   138                                                 Alot of the data from the original zarr_array is not needed for interpolation since the default linear interpolation method of interpn only needs the corners of the hypercube around a given point to interpolate it's value
   139                                                 Instead of the entire 8D parameter space.
   140                                                 """
   141    336.7 MiB      0.9 MiB           2           indices, values_around_point = self.read_values_around_point_for_interpolation(
   142    335.8 MiB      0.0 MiB           1               zarr_array, point_to_read_around, self.ivars
   143                                                 )
   144    336.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           9           grid = [
   145    336.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           9               params[these_indices] for these_indices, params in zip(indices, self.ivars)
   146                                                 ]  # the grid is the values of the parameters at the points we're interpolating between
   147    337.7 MiB      1.0 MiB           1           interpolated_points = interpn(grid, values_around_point, points)
   148    337.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           return interpolated_points

    58    331.8 MiB      0.0 MiB           1       arg_Tinj_v, arg_Tinj_i = find_nearest(u_sCO2.Tinj, arg_Tinj + to_kelvin_factor) # to kelvin
    59    331.8 MiB      0.0 MiB           1       arg_k_v, arg_k_i = find_nearest(u_sCO2.k, arg_k)

    65    331.8 MiB    331.8 MiB           1   @profile(stream=memory_profile_file)
    66                                         def get_kWe_kWt_over_mass_or_time(case, fluid, point, arg_L2_i, arg_L1_i, arg_grad_i, arg_D_i, arg_Tinj_i, arg_k_i):
    67                                         
    68                                             # --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    69                                             # For both H2O and sCO2, calculate:
    70                                             #       - kWe and kWt averages over mass flow rate & 
    71                                             #       - instantaneous kWe and kWt overtime 
    72                                             #
    73                                             # Outputs can be used for when interp_time == True, the following exists:
    74                                             #           sCO2_kWe_avg, sCO2_kWt_avg, H2O_kWe_avg, H2O_kWt_avg
    75                                             # Then, the following also get overriden when interp_time == True:
    76                                             #           sCO2_kWe, sCO2_kWt, H2O_kWe, H2O_kWt
    77                                             # 
    78                                             # When interp_time == False then all the output will exist and be plotted.
    79                                             # --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    80                                         
    81                                             # need initialization here
    82    331.8 MiB      0.0 MiB           1       sCO2_kWe_avg = None
    83    331.8 MiB      0.0 MiB           1       sCO2_kWt_avg = None 
    84    331.8 MiB      0.0 MiB           1       H2O_kWe_avg = None
    85    331.8 MiB      0.0 MiB           1       H2O_kWt_avg = None
    86    331.8 MiB      0.0 MiB           1       error_messages_d = {}
    87                                         
    88    331.8 MiB      0.0 MiB           1       if case == "utube":
    89                                         
    90                                         
    91    331.8 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           if fluid == "H2O" or fluid == "All":
    92    331.8 MiB      0.0 MiB           1               H2O_kWe_avg = u_H2O.kWe_avg[:, arg_L2_i, arg_L1_i, arg_grad_i, arg_D_i, arg_Tinj_i, arg_k_i]
    93    331.8 MiB      0.0 MiB           1               H2O_kWt_avg = u_H2O.kWt_avg[:, arg_L2_i, arg_L1_i, arg_grad_i, arg_D_i, arg_Tinj_i, arg_k_i]
    94                                         
    95    331.8 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           if fluid == "sCO2" or fluid == "All":
    96    331.8 MiB      0.0 MiB           1               sCO2_kWe_avg = u_sCO2.kWe_avg[:, arg_L2_i, arg_L1_i, arg_grad_i, arg_D_i, arg_Tinj_i, arg_k_i]
    97    331.8 MiB      0.0 MiB           1               sCO2_kWt_avg = u_sCO2.kWt_avg[:, arg_L2_i, arg_L1_i, arg_grad_i, arg_D_i, arg_Tinj_i, arg_k_i]

   104                                                     H2O_kWt_avg = c_H2O.kWt_avg[:, arg_L2_i, arg_L1_i, arg_grad_i, arg_D_i, arg_Tinj_i, arg_k_i]
   105                                         
   106                                                 if fluid == "sCO2" or fluid == "All":
   107                                                     sCO2_kWe_avg = c_sCO2.kWe_avg[:, arg_L2_i, arg_L1_i, arg_grad_i, arg_D_i, arg_Tinj_i, arg_k_i]

   147                                         def rename_for_contour(input1, input2, input3, input4):
   148                                         
   149    337.8 MiB      0.0 MiB           1   	kWe_avg_flipped = input1
   150    337.8 MiB      0.0 MiB           1   	kWt_avg_flipped = input2
   151    337.8 MiB      0.0 MiB           1   	Tout_flipped = input3
   152    337.8 MiB      0.0 MiB           1   	Pout_flipped = input4
   153                                         
   154    337.8 MiB      0.0 MiB           1   	return kWe_avg_flipped, kWt_avg_flipped, Tout_flipped, Pout_flipped

   340                                                 #Calculate instantaneous heat production
   341    341.6 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.Average_fluid_density = interpn((self.Pvector,self.Tvector),self.density,np.dstack((0.5*self.P_in + 0.5*self.Linear_production_pressure,0.5*self.T_in + 0.5*self.Linear_production_temperature+273.15))[0])

    39    340.1 MiB    340.1 MiB           1   @profile(stream=memory_profile_file)

    41                                                             u_sCO2, u_H2O, c_sCO2, c_H2O,
    42                                                              case, end_use, fluid, model,
    43                                                              Flow_user, Hor_length_user, Depth_user, Gradient_user, Diameter_user, Tin_user, krock_user,

    52                                             # ------------------------------------------

   482    341.7 MiB    341.7 MiB           1       @profile(stream=memory_profile_file)
   483                                             def calculatecapex(self):
   484    341.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.CAPEX_Drilling = self.Drilling_length*self.Drilling_cost_per_m/1e6 #Drilling capital cost [M$]
   485    341.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           if self.End_use == 1:   #direct-use heating
   486    341.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1               self.CAPEX_Surface_Plant = np.max(self.Instantaneous_heat_production)*self.Direct_use_heat_cost_per_kWth/1e6 #[M$]
   487                                                 elif self.End_use == 2: #electricity production
   488                                                     if self.Fluid == 1:
   489                                                         self.CAPEX_Surface_Plant = np.max(self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_1)*self.Power_plant_cost_per_kWe/1e6 #[M$]
   490                                                     elif self.Fluid == 2:
   491                                                         self.CAPEX_Surface_Plant = np.max(self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_4)*self.Power_plant_cost_per_kWe/1e6 #[M$]
   492                                                 
   493    341.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.TotalCAPEX = self.CAPEX_Drilling + self.CAPEX_Surface_Plant           #Total system capital cost (only includes drilling and surface plant cost) [M$]

   495    341.8 MiB    341.8 MiB           1       @profile(stream=memory_profile_file)
   496                                             def calculatopex(self):
   497                                                 #Calculate OPEX
   498    341.8 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           if self.End_use == 1: #direct-use heating

   500                                                 elif self.End_use == 2: #electricity production
   501                                                     self.OPEX_Plant = self.O_and_M_cost_plant*self.CAPEX_Surface_Plant  #Annual plant O&M cost [M$/year]
   502    341.8 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.AverageOPEX_Plant = np.average(self.OPEX_Plant)

   316                                                             self.error_codes = np.append(self.error_codes,5000)
   317                                                     elif self.End_use == 2: #electricity production
   318                                                         if self.Average_electricity_production == 0:
   319                                                             self.LCOE = 9999
   320                                                             self.error_codes = np.append(self.error_codes,6000)
   321                                                         else:
   322                                                             self.LCOE = (self.TotalCAPEX + np.sum(self.OPEX_Plant*Discount_vector))*1e6/np.sum((self.Annual_electricity_production-self.Annual_pumping_power)/1e3*Discount_vector) #$/MWh
   323                                                         if self.LCOE<0:

   325                                                             self.error_codes = np.append(self.error_codes,7000)
   326                                                     
   327                                                 else:  #Production temperature went below injection temperature # AB HERE *****
   328                                                     self.error_codes = np.append(self.error_codes,1000)

   338    342.1 MiB    342.1 MiB           1       @profile(stream=memory_profile_file)
   339                                             def calculateheatproduction(self):
   340                                                 #Calculate instantaneous heat production
   341    342.1 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.Average_fluid_density = interpn((self.Pvector,self.Tvector),self.density,np.dstack((0.5*self.P_in + 0.5*self.Linear_production_pressure,0.5*self.T_in + 0.5*self.Linear_production_temperature+273.15))[0])
   342    342.1 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.hprod = interpn((self.Pvector,self.Tvector),self.enthalpy,np.dstack((self.Linear_production_pressure,self.Linear_production_temperature+273.15))[0])
   343    342.1 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.hinj = interpn((self.Pvector,self.Tvector),self.enthalpy,np.array([self.P_in,self.T_in+273.15]))
   344    342.1 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.Instantaneous_heat_production = self.Flow_rate*(self.hprod - self.hinj)/1000 #Heat production based on produced minus injected enthalpy [kW]
   345                                                 
   346    342.1 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           print(self.Instantaneous_heat_production.shape)
   347                                         
   348                                                 #Calculate annual heat production (kWh)
   349    342.1 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.Annual_heat_production = 8760/5*(self.Instantaneous_heat_production[0::4][0:-1]+self.Instantaneous_heat_production[1::4]+self.Instantaneous_heat_production[2::4]+self.Instantaneous_heat_production[3::4]+self.Instantaneous_heat_production[4::4])
   350                                               
   351                                                 #Calculate average heat production
   352    342.1 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.AveAnnualHeatProduction = np.average(self.Annual_heat_production) #kWh
   353    342.1 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.AveInstHeatProduction = np.average(self.Instantaneous_heat_production) #kWth

    20    341.8 MiB    341.8 MiB           1   @profile(stream=memory_profile_file)
    21                                         def fixed_economic_inputs():
    22                                         
    23                                             # --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    24                                             # Inputs that don't get changed by the app.
    25                                             # --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    26                                         
    27    341.8 MiB      0.0 MiB           1       O_and_M_cost_plant = 0.015                 # Operation & maintance cost of surface plant expressed as fraction of total surface plant capital cost [-] (between 0 and 0.2)
    28    341.8 MiB      0.0 MiB           1       Pump_efficiency = 0.8                      # Pump efficiency for cirulcation pump (if required) [-] (between 0.5 and 1)
    29    341.8 MiB      0.0 MiB           1       Turbine_isentropic_efficiency = 0.9        # Isentropic efficiency for turbine when CO2 is working fluid [-] (between 0.8 and 1)
    30    341.8 MiB      0.0 MiB           1       Generator_efficiency = 0.98                # Conversion efficiency from mechanical turbine work to electricity [-] (between 0.8 and 1)
    31    341.8 MiB      0.0 MiB           1       Compressor_isentropic_efficiency = 0.9     # Isentropic efficiency for compressor when CO2 is working fluid [-] (between 0.8 and 1)
    32    341.8 MiB      0.0 MiB           1       T0 = 20 + to_kelvin_factor # to kelvin     # Dead-state temperature [K] (between 278.15 and 303.15)
    33    341.8 MiB      0.0 MiB           1       P0 = 1e5                                   # Dead-state pressure [Pa] (between 0.8e5 and 1.1e5)
    34    341.8 MiB      0.0 MiB           1       Electricity_rate = 0.1                     # Electricity rate in direct-use for pumping power (if pumping is required) [$/kWh] (between 0 and 0.5)
    35                                         
    36    341.8 MiB      0.0 MiB           1       return O_and_M_cost_plant, Pump_efficiency, Turbine_isentropic_efficiency, Generator_efficiency, Compressor_isentropic_efficiency, T0, P0, Electricity_rate

   482    342.1 MiB    342.1 MiB           1       @profile(stream=memory_profile_file)
   483                                             def calculatecapex(self):

   485    342.1 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           if self.End_use == 1:   #direct-use heating
   486    342.1 MiB      0.0 MiB           1               self.CAPEX_Surface_Plant = np.max(self.Instantaneous_heat_production)*self.Direct_use_heat_cost_per_kWth/1e6 #[M$]
   487                                                 elif self.End_use == 2: #electricity production
   488                                                     if self.Fluid == 1:
   489                                                         self.CAPEX_Surface_Plant = np.max(self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_1)*self.Power_plant_cost_per_kWe/1e6 #[M$]
   490                                                     elif self.Fluid == 2:
   491                                                         self.CAPEX_Surface_Plant = np.max(self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_4)*self.Power_plant_cost_per_kWe/1e6 #[M$]
   492                                                 
   493    342.1 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.TotalCAPEX = self.CAPEX_Drilling + self.CAPEX_Surface_Plant           #Total system capital cost (only includes drilling and surface plant cost) [M$]

   338    342.7 MiB    342.7 MiB           1       @profile(stream=memory_profile_file)
   339                                             def calculateheatproduction(self):
   340                                                 #Calculate instantaneous heat production
   341    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.Average_fluid_density = interpn((self.Pvector,self.Tvector),self.density,np.dstack((0.5*self.P_in + 0.5*self.Linear_production_pressure,0.5*self.T_in + 0.5*self.Linear_production_temperature+273.15))[0])
   342    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.hprod = interpn((self.Pvector,self.Tvector),self.enthalpy,np.dstack((self.Linear_production_pressure,self.Linear_production_temperature+273.15))[0])
   343    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.hinj = interpn((self.Pvector,self.Tvector),self.enthalpy,np.array([self.P_in,self.T_in+273.15]))
   344    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.Instantaneous_heat_production = self.Flow_rate*(self.hprod - self.hinj)/1000 #Heat production based on produced minus injected enthalpy [kW]
   345                                                 
   346    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           print(self.Instantaneous_heat_production.shape)

   350

   363    342.7 MiB    342.7 MiB           1       @profile(stream=memory_profile_file)
   364                                             def calculateelectricityproduction(self):
   365                                                 
   366                                                 #Calculate instantaneous exergy production, exergy extraction, and electricity generation (MW) and annual electricity generation [kWh]
   367    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.h_prod = self.hprod #produced enthalpy [J/kg]
   368    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.h_inj = self.hinj #injected enthalpy [J/kg]
   369    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.s_prod = interpn((self.Pvector,self.Tvector),self.entropy,np.dstack((self.Linear_production_pressure,self.Linear_production_temperature+273.15))[0]) #produced entropy [J/kg/K]
   370    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.s_inj = interpn((self.Pvector,self.Tvector),self.entropy,np.array([self.P_in,self.T_in+273.15])) #injected entropy [J/kg/K]
   371                                                     
   372    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.Instantaneous_exergy_production = (self.Flow_rate*(self.h_prod-self.h_0 - self.T0*(self.s_prod-self.s_0)))/1000 #[kW]
   373    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.Instantaneous_exergy_extraction = (self.Flow_rate*(self.h_prod-self.h_inj - self.T0*(self.s_prod-self.s_inj)))/1000 #[kW]     
   374                                                     
   375    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.AverageInstNetExergyProduction = np.average(self.Instantaneous_exergy_production) #[kW]
   376    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.AverageInstNetExergyExtraction = np.average(self.Instantaneous_exergy_extraction) #[kW]
   377                                                     
   378    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           if self.Fluid == 1:
   379                                                     
   380                                                     if self.T_in >= 50 and min(self.Linear_production_temperature) >= 100 and max(self.Linear_production_temperature) <= 385:
   381                                                         self.Instantaneous_utilization_efficiency_method_1 = np.interp(self.Linear_production_temperature,self.Utilization_efficiency_correlation_temperatures,self.Utilization_efficiency_correlation_conversion,left = 0) #Utilization efficiency based on conversion of produced exergy to electricity
   382                                                         self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_1 = self.Instantaneous_exergy_production*self.Instantaneous_utilization_efficiency_method_1 #[kW]
   383                                                         self.Instantaneous_themal_efficiency = np.interp(self.Linear_production_temperature,self.Heat_to_power_efficiency_correlation_temperatures,self.Heat_to_power_efficiency_correlation_conversion,left = 0) #Utilization efficiency based on conversion of produced exergy to electricity
   384                                                         self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_3 = self.Instantaneous_heat_production*self.Instantaneous_themal_efficiency #[kW]
   385                                                         
   386                                                     else: #Water injection temperature and/or production tempeature fall outside the range used in the correlations
   387                                                         self.error_codes = np.append(self.error_codes,2000)
   388                                                         self.Instantaneous_utilization_efficiency_method_1 = np.zeros(len(self.Time_array))
   389                                                         self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_1 = np.zeros(len(self.Time_array))
   390                                                         self.Instantaneous_themal_efficiency = np.zeros(len(self.Time_array))
   391                                                         self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_3 = np.zeros(len(self.Time_array))
   392                                                             
   393                                                     #based on method 1 for now (could be 50-50)
   394                                                     self.Annual_electricity_production = 8760/5*(self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_1[0::4][0:-1]+self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_1[1::4]+self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_1[2::4]+self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_1[3::4]+self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_1[4::4])
   395                                                     self.Inst_electricity_production = self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_1 #[kW]
   396                                                     self.AveInstElectricityProduction = np.average(self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_1) #[kW]
   397                                                     
   398                                             
   399    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           elif self.Fluid == 2:
   400    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1               T_prod = self.Linear_production_temperature #Production temperature [deg.C]
   401    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1               P_prod = self.Linear_production_pressure    #Production pressure [Pa]
   402                                             
   403    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1               h_turbine_out_ideal = interpn((self.Pvector_ap,self.svector_ap),self.hPs,np.dstack((np.ones(self.TNOP)*self.Turbine_outlet_pressure*1e5,self.s_prod))[0]) 
   404    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1               self.Instantaneous_turbine_power = self.Flow_rate*(self.h_prod-h_turbine_out_ideal)*self.Turbine_isentropic_efficiency/1000 #Turbine output [kW]
   405    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1               h_turbine_out_actual = self.h_prod-self.Instantaneous_turbine_power/self.Flow_rate*1000 #Actual fluid enthalpy at turbine outlet [J/kg]
   406    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1               self.T_turbine_out_actual = interpn((self.Pvector_ap,self.hvector_ap),self.TPh,np.dstack((np.ones(self.TNOP)*self.Turbine_outlet_pressure*1e5,h_turbine_out_actual))[0])-273.15 
   407                                                         
   408    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1               if min(self.T_turbine_out_actual) > 37 and self.T_in > 32:
   409                                                         self.Pre_cooling_temperature = min(self.T_turbine_out_actual) - self.Pre_Cooling_Delta_T
   410                                                         
   411                                                         Pre_compressor_h = interpn((self.Pvector,self.Tvector),self.enthalpy,np.array([self.Turbine_outlet_pressure*1e5,self.Pre_cooling_temperature+273.15])) 
   412                                                             
   413                                                         Pre_cooling = self.Flow_rate*(h_turbine_out_actual - Pre_compressor_h)/1e3 #Pre-compressor cooling [kWth]
   414                                                         Pre_compressor_s = interpn((self.Pvector,self.Tvector),self.entropy,np.array([self.Turbine_outlet_pressure*1e5,self.Pre_cooling_temperature+273.15])) 
   415                                                             
   416                                                             
   417                                                         Post_compressor_h_ideal = interpn((self.Pvector_ap,self.svector_ap),self.hPs,np.array([self.P_in,Pre_compressor_s[0]])) 
   418                                                         Post_compressor_h_actual = Pre_compressor_h + (Post_compressor_h_ideal-Pre_compressor_h)/self.Compressor_isentropic_efficiency #Actual fluid enthalpy at compressor outlet [J/kg]
   419                                                         self.Post_compressor_T_actual = interpn((self.Pvector_ap,self.hvector_ap),self.TPh,np.array([self.P_in,Post_compressor_h_actual[0]])) - 273.15
   420                                                         Compressor_Work = self.Flow_rate*(Post_compressor_h_actual - Pre_compressor_h)/1e3 #[kWe]
   421                                                         Post_cooling = self.Flow_rate*(Post_compressor_h_actual - self.h_inj)/1e3 #Fluid cooling after compression [kWth]
   422                                                             
   423                                                         if Post_cooling<0:
   424                                                             ResistiveHeating = -Post_cooling
   425                                                             Post_cooling = 0
   426                                                         else:
   427                                                             ResistiveHeating = 0
   428                                                            
   429                                                         Total_cooling = Pre_cooling + Post_cooling #Total CO2 cooling requirements [kWth]
   430                                                         
   431                                                         T_air_in_pre_cooler = self.T0-273.15
   432                                                         T_air_out_pre_cooler = (self.T_turbine_out_actual+self.Pre_cooling_temperature)/2 #Air outlet temperature in pre-cooler [deg.C]
   433                                                         cp_air = np.interp(0.5*T_air_in_pre_cooler+0.5*T_air_out_pre_cooler,self.Tair_for_cp_array,self.cp_air_array) #Air specific heat capacity in pre-cooler [J/kg/K]
   434                                                         m_air_pre_cooler = Pre_cooling*1000/(cp_air*(T_air_out_pre_cooler - T_air_in_pre_cooler)) #Air flow rate in pre-cooler [kg/s]
   435                                                        
   436                                                         T_air_in_post_cooler = self.T0-273.15
   437                                                         T_air_out_post_cooler = (self.Post_compressor_T_actual+self.T_in)/2 #Air outlet temperature in post-cooler [deg.C]
   438                                                         cp_air = np.interp(0.5*T_air_in_post_cooler+0.5*T_air_out_post_cooler,self.Tair_for_cp_array,self.cp_air_array) #Air specific heat capacity in post-cooler [J/kg/K]
   439                                                             
   440                                                         m_air_post_cooler = Post_cooling*1000/(cp_air*(T_air_out_post_cooler - T_air_in_post_cooler)) #Air flow rate in post-cooler [kg/s]
   441                                                         
   442                                                         Air_cooling_power = (m_air_pre_cooler+m_air_post_cooler)*0.25  #Electricity for air-cooling, assuming 0.25 kWe per kg/s [kWe] 
   443                                                         
   444                                                         self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_4 = self.Instantaneous_turbine_power*self.Generator_efficiency-Compressor_Work-Air_cooling_power-ResistiveHeating # Net electricity using CO2 direct turbine expansion cycle [kWe]
   445                                                         self.Inst_electricity_production = self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_4 #[kW]
   446                                                         self.Annual_electricity_production = 8760/5*(self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_4[0::4][0:-1]+self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_4[1::4]+self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_4[2::4]+self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_4[3::4]+self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_4[4::4])
   447                                                         self.AveInstElectricityProduction = np.average(self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_4) #[kW]
   448                                                         #check if negative
   449                                                         if min(self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_4)<0:
   450                                                             self.error_codes = np.append(self.error_codes,5500) #Calculated electricity generation is negative
   451                                                             
   452                                                             self.Annual_electricity_production = np.zeros(self.Lifetime)
   453                                                             self.Inst_electricity_production = np.zeros(self.TNOP)
   454                                                             self.AveInstElectricityProduction = 0
   455                                                     else: #turbine outlet or reinjection temperature too low
   456    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1                   if (self.T_in <= 32):
   457    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1                       self.error_codes = np.append(self.error_codes,3000)
   458                                                             
   459    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1                   if (min(self.T_turbine_out_actual)<=37):
   460    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1                       self.error_codes = np.append(self.error_codes,4000)
   461                                                             
   462    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1                   self.Annual_electricity_production = np.zeros(self.Lifetime)
   463    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1                   self.Inst_electricity_production = np.zeros(self.TNOP)
   464    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1                   self.AveInstElectricityProduction = 0
   465                                                 
   466    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.calculatepumpingpower()
   467

   469    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.AveAnnualElectricityProduction = np.average(self.Annual_electricity_production) #[kWh]
   470    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.AveInstNetElectricityProduction = self.AveInstElectricityProduction - np.average(self.PumpingPower) #[kW]

   482    342.7 MiB    342.7 MiB           1       @profile(stream=memory_profile_file)
   483                                             def calculatecapex(self):
   484    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.CAPEX_Drilling = self.Drilling_length*self.Drilling_cost_per_m/1e6 #Drilling capital cost [M$]
   485    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           if self.End_use == 1:   #direct-use heating
   486                                                     self.CAPEX_Surface_Plant = np.max(self.Instantaneous_heat_production)*self.Direct_use_heat_cost_per_kWth/1e6 #[M$]
   487    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           elif self.End_use == 2: #electricity production
   488    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1               if self.Fluid == 1:
   489                                                         self.CAPEX_Surface_Plant = np.max(self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_1)*self.Power_plant_cost_per_kWe/1e6 #[M$]
   490    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1               elif self.Fluid == 2:
   491    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1                   self.CAPEX_Surface_Plant = np.max(self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_4)*self.Power_plant_cost_per_kWe/1e6 #[M$]
   492                                                 
   493    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.TotalCAPEX = self.CAPEX_Drilling + self.CAPEX_Surface_Plant           #Total system capital cost (only includes drilling and surface plant cost) [M$]

   495    342.7 MiB    342.7 MiB           1       @profile(stream=memory_profile_file)

   498    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           if self.End_use == 1: #direct-use heating

   500    342.7 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           elif self.End_use == 2: #electricity production

   214    343.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.Utilization_efficiency_correlation_conversion = np.array([0.2, 0.45])  #Efficiency of ORC conversion from production exergy to electricity based on GEOPHIRES correlation [-]
   215    343.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.Heat_to_power_efficiency_correlation_temperatures = np.array([100, 200]) #Linear correlation based on Chad Augustine's thesis [deg.C]
   216    343.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.Heat_to_power_efficiency_correlation_conversion = np.array([0.05, 0.14]) #Conversion from enthalpy to electricity [-]
   217                                         
   218                                                 #Calculate dead-state enthalpy and entropy in case of electricity production
   219    343.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           if self.End_use == 2:   
   220    343.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1               self.h_0 = interpn((self.Pvector,self.Tvector),self.enthalpy,np.array([self.P0,self.T0]))[0] #dead-state enthalpy [J/kg]
   221    343.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1               self.s_0 = interpn((self.Pvector,self.Tvector),self.entropy,np.array([self.P0,self.T0]))[0] #dead-state entropy [J/kg/K]

   228

   475    343.0 MiB    343.0 MiB           1       @profile(stream=memory_profile_file)
   476                                             def calculatepumpingpower(self):

   478    343.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.PumpingPower = (self.P_in-self.Linear_production_pressure)*self.Flow_rate/self.Average_fluid_density/self.Pump_efficiency/1e3 #Pumping power [kW]

   338    343.0 MiB    343.0 MiB           1       @profile(stream=memory_profile_file)
   339                                             def calculateheatproduction(self):
   340                                                 #Calculate instantaneous heat production
   341    343.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.Average_fluid_density = interpn((self.Pvector,self.Tvector),self.density,np.dstack((0.5*self.P_in + 0.5*self.Linear_production_pressure,0.5*self.T_in + 0.5*self.Linear_production_temperature+273.15))[0])
   342    343.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.hprod = interpn((self.Pvector,self.Tvector),self.enthalpy,np.dstack((self.Linear_production_pressure,self.Linear_production_temperature+273.15))[0])
   343    343.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.hinj = interpn((self.Pvector,self.Tvector),self.enthalpy,np.array([self.P_in,self.T_in+273.15]))
   344    343.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.Instantaneous_heat_production = self.Flow_rate*(self.hprod - self.hinj)/1000 #Heat production based on produced minus injected enthalpy [kW]
   345                                                 
   346    343.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           print(self.Instantaneous_heat_production.shape)
   347                                         
   348                                                 #Calculate annual heat production (kWh)
   349    343.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.Annual_heat_production = 8760/5*(self.Instantaneous_heat_production[0::4][0:-1]+self.Instantaneous_heat_production[1::4]+self.Instantaneous_heat_production[2::4]+self.Instantaneous_heat_production[3::4]+self.Instantaneous_heat_production[4::4])
   350                                               
   351                                                 #Calculate average heat production
   352    343.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.AveAnnualHeatProduction = np.average(self.Annual_heat_production) #kWh
   353    343.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.AveInstHeatProduction = np.average(self.Instantaneous_heat_production) #kWth
   354

   363    343.0 MiB    343.0 MiB           1       @profile(stream=memory_profile_file)
   364                                             def calculateelectricityproduction(self):
   365                                                 
   366                                                 #Calculate instantaneous exergy production, exergy extraction, and electricity generation (MW) and annual electricity generation [kWh]
   367    343.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.h_prod = self.hprod #produced enthalpy [J/kg]
   368    343.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.h_inj = self.hinj #injected enthalpy [J/kg]
   369    343.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.s_prod = interpn((self.Pvector,self.Tvector),self.entropy,np.dstack((self.Linear_production_pressure,self.Linear_production_temperature+273.15))[0]) #produced entropy [J/kg/K]
   370    343.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.s_inj = interpn((self.Pvector,self.Tvector),self.entropy,np.array([self.P_in,self.T_in+273.15])) #injected entropy [J/kg/K]
   371                                                     
   372    343.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.Instantaneous_exergy_production = (self.Flow_rate*(self.h_prod-self.h_0 - self.T0*(self.s_prod-self.s_0)))/1000 #[kW]
   373    343.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.Instantaneous_exergy_extraction = (self.Flow_rate*(self.h_prod-self.h_inj - self.T0*(self.s_prod-self.s_inj)))/1000 #[kW]     
   374                                                     
   375    343.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.AverageInstNetExergyProduction = np.average(self.Instantaneous_exergy_production) #[kW]
   376    343.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.AverageInstNetExergyExtraction = np.average(self.Instantaneous_exergy_extraction) #[kW]
   377                                                     
   378    343.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           if self.Fluid == 1:
   379                                                     
   380    343.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1               if self.T_in >= 50 and min(self.Linear_production_temperature) >= 100 and max(self.Linear_production_temperature) <= 385:
   381                                                         self.Instantaneous_utilization_efficiency_method_1 = np.interp(self.Linear_production_temperature,self.Utilization_efficiency_correlation_temperatures,self.Utilization_efficiency_correlation_conversion,left = 0) #Utilization efficiency based on conversion of produced exergy to electricity
   382                                                         self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_1 = self.Instantaneous_exergy_production*self.Instantaneous_utilization_efficiency_method_1 #[kW]
   383                                                         self.Instantaneous_themal_efficiency = np.interp(self.Linear_production_temperature,self.Heat_to_power_efficiency_correlation_temperatures,self.Heat_to_power_efficiency_correlation_conversion,left = 0) #Utilization efficiency based on conversion of produced exergy to electricity
   384                                                         self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_3 = self.Instantaneous_heat_production*self.Instantaneous_themal_efficiency #[kW]
   385                                                         
   386                                                     else: #Water injection temperature and/or production tempeature fall outside the range used in the correlations
   387    343.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1                   self.error_codes = np.append(self.error_codes,2000)
   388    343.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1                   self.Instantaneous_utilization_efficiency_method_1 = np.zeros(len(self.Time_array))
   389    343.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1                   self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_1 = np.zeros(len(self.Time_array))
   390    343.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1                   self.Instantaneous_themal_efficiency = np.zeros(len(self.Time_array))
   391    343.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1                   self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_3 = np.zeros(len(self.Time_array))
   392                                                             
   393                                                     #based on method 1 for now (could be 50-50)
   394    343.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1               self.Annual_electricity_production = 8760/5*(self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_1[0::4][0:-1]+self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_1[1::4]+self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_1[2::4]+self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_1[3::4]+self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_1[4::4])
   395    343.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1               self.Inst_electricity_production = self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_1 #[kW]
   396    343.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1               self.AveInstElectricityProduction = np.average(self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_1) #[kW]
   397                                                     
   398                                             
   399                                                 elif self.Fluid == 2:
   400                                                     T_prod = self.Linear_production_temperature #Production temperature [deg.C]
   401                                                     P_prod = self.Linear_production_pressure    #Production pressure [Pa]
   402                                             
   403                                                     h_turbine_out_ideal = interpn((self.Pvector_ap,self.svector_ap),self.hPs,np.dstack((np.ones(self.TNOP)*self.Turbine_outlet_pressure*1e5,self.s_prod))[0]) 
   404                                                     self.Instantaneous_turbine_power = self.Flow_rate*(self.h_prod-h_turbine_out_ideal)*self.Turbine_isentropic_efficiency/1000 #Turbine output [kW]
   405                                                     h_turbine_out_actual = self.h_prod-self.Instantaneous_turbine_power/self.Flow_rate*1000 #Actual fluid enthalpy at turbine outlet [J/kg]
   406                                                     self.T_turbine_out_actual = interpn((self.Pvector_ap,self.hvector_ap),self.TPh,np.dstack((np.ones(self.TNOP)*self.Turbine_outlet_pressure*1e5,h_turbine_out_actual))[0])-273.15 
   407                                                         
   408                                                     if min(self.T_turbine_out_actual) > 37 and self.T_in > 32:
   409                                                         self.Pre_cooling_temperature = min(self.T_turbine_out_actual) - self.Pre_Cooling_Delta_T
   410                                                         
   411                                                         Pre_compressor_h = interpn((self.Pvector,self.Tvector),self.enthalpy,np.array([self.Turbine_outlet_pressure*1e5,self.Pre_cooling_temperature+273.15])) 
   412                                                             
   413                                                         Pre_cooling = self.Flow_rate*(h_turbine_out_actual - Pre_compressor_h)/1e3 #Pre-compressor cooling [kWth]
   414                                                         Pre_compressor_s = interpn((self.Pvector,self.Tvector),self.entropy,np.array([self.Turbine_outlet_pressure*1e5,self.Pre_cooling_temperature+273.15])) 
   415                                                             
   416                                                             
   417                                                         Post_compressor_h_ideal = interpn((self.Pvector_ap,self.svector_ap),self.hPs,np.array([self.P_in,Pre_compressor_s[0]])) 
   418                                                         Post_compressor_h_actual = Pre_compressor_h + (Post_compressor_h_ideal-Pre_compressor_h)/self.Compressor_isentropic_efficiency #Actual fluid enthalpy at compressor outlet [J/kg]
   419                                                         self.Post_compressor_T_actual = interpn((self.Pvector_ap,self.hvector_ap),self.TPh,np.array([self.P_in,Post_compressor_h_actual[0]])) - 273.15
   420                                                         Compressor_Work = self.Flow_rate*(Post_compressor_h_actual - Pre_compressor_h)/1e3 #[kWe]
   421                                                         Post_cooling = self.Flow_rate*(Post_compressor_h_actual - self.h_inj)/1e3 #Fluid cooling after compression [kWth]
   422                                                             
   423                                                         if Post_cooling<0:
   424                                                             ResistiveHeating = -Post_cooling
   425                                                             Post_cooling = 0
   426                                                         else:
   427                                                             ResistiveHeating = 0
   428                                                            
   429                                                         Total_cooling = Pre_cooling + Post_cooling #Total CO2 cooling requirements [kWth]
   430                                                         
   431                                                         T_air_in_pre_cooler = self.T0-273.15
   432                                                         T_air_out_pre_cooler = (self.T_turbine_out_actual+self.Pre_cooling_temperature)/2 #Air outlet temperature in pre-cooler [deg.C]
   433                                                         cp_air = np.interp(0.5*T_air_in_pre_cooler+0.5*T_air_out_pre_cooler,self.Tair_for_cp_array,self.cp_air_array) #Air specific heat capacity in pre-cooler [J/kg/K]
   434                                                         m_air_pre_cooler = Pre_cooling*1000/(cp_air*(T_air_out_pre_cooler - T_air_in_pre_cooler)) #Air flow rate in pre-cooler [kg/s]
   435                                                        
   436                                                         T_air_in_post_cooler = self.T0-273.15
   437                                                         T_air_out_post_cooler = (self.Post_compressor_T_actual+self.T_in)/2 #Air outlet temperature in post-cooler [deg.C]
   438                                                         cp_air = np.interp(0.5*T_air_in_post_cooler+0.5*T_air_out_post_cooler,self.Tair_for_cp_array,self.cp_air_array) #Air specific heat capacity in post-cooler [J/kg/K]
   439                                                             
   440                                                         m_air_post_cooler = Post_cooling*1000/(cp_air*(T_air_out_post_cooler - T_air_in_post_cooler)) #Air flow rate in post-cooler [kg/s]
   441                                                         
   442                                                         Air_cooling_power = (m_air_pre_cooler+m_air_post_cooler)*0.25  #Electricity for air-cooling, assuming 0.25 kWe per kg/s [kWe] 
   443                                                         
   444                                                         self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_4 = self.Instantaneous_turbine_power*self.Generator_efficiency-Compressor_Work-Air_cooling_power-ResistiveHeating # Net electricity using CO2 direct turbine expansion cycle [kWe]
   445                                                         self.Inst_electricity_production = self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_4 #[kW]
   446                                                         self.Annual_electricity_production = 8760/5*(self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_4[0::4][0:-1]+self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_4[1::4]+self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_4[2::4]+self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_4[3::4]+self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_4[4::4])
   447                                                         self.AveInstElectricityProduction = np.average(self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_4) #[kW]
   448                                                         #check if negative
   449                                                         if min(self.Instantaneous_electricity_production_method_4)<0:
   450                                                             self.error_codes = np.append(self.error_codes,5500) #Calculated electricity generation is negative
   451                                                             
   452                                                             self.Annual_electricity_production = np.zeros(self.Lifetime)
   453                                                             self.Inst_electricity_production = np.zeros(self.TNOP)
   454                                                             self.AveInstElectricityProduction = 0
   455                                                     else: #turbine outlet or reinjection temperature too low
   456                                                         if (self.T_in <= 32):
   457                                                             self.error_codes = np.append(self.error_codes,3000)
   458                                                             
   459                                                         if (min(self.T_turbine_out_actual)<=37):
   460                                                             self.error_codes = np.append(self.error_codes,4000)
   461                                                             
   462                                                         self.Annual_electricity_production = np.zeros(self.Lifetime)
   463                                                         self.Inst_electricity_production = np.zeros(self.TNOP)
   464                                                         self.AveInstElectricityProduction = 0
   465                                                 
   466    343.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.calculatepumpingpower()
   467                                                 
   468    343.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.Average_electricity_production = np.average(self.Annual_electricity_production)/8760 #[kW]
   469    343.0 MiB      0.0 MiB           1           self.AveAnnualElectricityProduction = np.average(self.Annual_electricity_production) #[kWh]
